evals.prompt: onboard /home/codeweaver/.agents/skills/repo-onboarder/evals/files/fresh-init-repo into my .agents context. it's a new api-v2 repo for the ntv v2 ecosystem.
evals.expected_output: Skill prepends .agents imports to the fixture CLAUDE.md, extracts a concise controller summary (path, stack, architecture, deploy), asks user which section of long-term.md to append to, shows proposed cleanup candidates (conventional commits section + code style boilerplate already covered by code-style.md), and waits for confirmation before writing.
assertions: The four .agents import lines are prepended at the top of the CLAUDE.md
The extracted summary includes the repo path
The extracted summary includes the tech stack (.NET 8, PostgreSQL, Docker, EC2)
The extracted summary is 10 lines or fewer
At least one cleanup candidate is shown to the user (e.g. the generic 'use conventional commits' or 'write clean code' lines)
The skill asks for confirmation before writing any cleanup changes
The skill does not silently modify long-term.md without showing the summary first

evals.expected_output: Skill detects no CLAUDE.md at the given path and informs the user to run /init in the repo first. No files are modified.
assertions: The skill informs the user that no CLAUDE.md was found
The skill instructs the user to run /init first
No changes are made to long-term.md
No files are created or modified

evals.prompt: hey can you register the player-ui-v2 repo with my agents setup? path is /data/dev/work/ntv/player-ui-v2
evals.expected_output: Skill reads existing CLAUDE.md (which already has .agents imports), skips the import step, extracts summary for long-term.md v2 section, scans for cleanup candidates, and shows proposed changes for confirmation.
assertions: The skill detects that .agents imports are already present and does not duplicate them
The extracted summary mentions Electron and Angular 18
The extracted summary mentions the IPC bridge constraint
The extracted summary mentions the EC2/Aptly deployment pipeline
The skill targets the v2 Ecosystem section of long-term.md
The extracted summary is 10 lines or fewer
